description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear design. The exterior features large glass windows, black and white wall panels, and several outdoor terraces, including a rooftop garden with a prominent tree. The house is surrounded by landscaped areas, including a row of trees lining the driveway and a green lawn. There are multiple entry points, with the main entrance accessible via a paved driveway and walkway. The structure includes several balconies and open spaces, providing ample natural light and outdoor living areas. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on clean lines and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring terraces and a rooftop garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a row of trees leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rooftop garden, terraces, and the integration of greenery with the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extensive glass windows, multiple balconies, and the landscaped lawn area.
description_view_3: View from the driveway side, emphasizing the symmetrical tree-lined path and the main entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and a straight paved walkway flanked by trees
